title: Alex's Mobs - Naturalist Compat
description: Remove duplicate items and entities with the goal of integrating both Alex's Mobs and Naturalist so they work as if they were a single mod!
body:
**The goal of these compat mods I'm making is to make mods work better together in modpacks by removing duplicate items, mobs, and blocks. It ensures that anything dependent on the removed items, mobs and blocks still works by redirecting those dependencies to the remaining equivalent items, mobs and blocks.**
## List of changes
### Removed Duplicate Mobs
- Naturalist's Rhino
- Naturalist's Alligator
- Naturalist's Catfish
- Naturalist's Elephant
- Naturalist's Rattlesnake
- Naturalist's Brown Bear
### Removed Duplicate Items
- Naturalist's Alligator Egg
- Naturalist's Bear Fur
- Naturalist's Raw Catfish
- Naturalist's Cooked Catfish
- Naturalist's Bucket of Catfish
### Crafting Recipe Adjustments
- **Naturalist Teddy Bear**: Now crafted using Alex's Mobs Bear Fur
